Uses of Package
gelabert.ytdlgui

  • Classes in gelabert.ytdlgui used by gelabert.ytdlgui
    Class
    Description
    Category
    Simple data model used to represent a media category loaded from JSON.
    MainFrame
    Main application window.
    Media
    Data transfer object that represents one media entry returned by the backend API.
    MediaFile
    Local representation of a media file shown in the media library.
    MediaPollingComponent
    Reusable Swing component that wraps ApiClient and performs periodic polling for newly added media in the DI Media NET backend.
    MediaPollingEvent
    Event fired when the polling component detects newly added media items.
    MediaPollingListener
    Listener notified whenever MediaPollingComponent discovers new media.
    User
    Minimal user model used by local JSON examples and simple UI bindings.
    Usuari
    Maps to the API Usuari JSON.
